properties./Dataset_Description: This Thyroid Cancer dataset contains a collection of patients with scintigraphies and clinical data who have confirmed thyroid gland cancer.
properties./CancerStage3_Method: 8th edition of the American Joint Commission on Cancer (AJCC)/TNM staging system for thyroid cancer
properties./CancerStage2_Method: 8th edition of the American Joint Commission on Cancer (AJCC)/TNM staging system for thyroid cancer
properties./CancerStage1_Method: 8th edition of the American Joint Commission on Cancer (AJCC)/TNM staging system for thyroid cancer

properties.mapping ImagingProcedure3_Category:
SELECT 	"Dataset_Identifier" AS datasetId,
		'Imaging (procedure)' AS propertyNameOriginal,
		'Imaging (procedure)' AS originalValue,
		'ImagingProcedure3_Category' AS propertyNameEUCAIM,
        "ImagingProcedure3_Category" AS codeInEUCAIM,
		CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS VARCHAR) AS mappingTimestamp,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE

properties.entity:LabResult9:
SELECT 	"LabTestResult9_Identifier" AS Identifier,
		"Patient_Identifier" AS PatientIdentifier,
		"LabTestResult9_Code" AS codeEUCAIM,
		'Stimulated Thyroglobulin test' AS codeOriginal,
		"LabTestResult9_ValueUnit" AS ValueUnitEUCAIM,
		'nanogram per milliliter' AS ValueUnitOriginal,
		CASE
			WHEN "LabTestResult9_ValueAsNumber" NOT IN ('?', '', 'NA', 'null', 'Unknown' )
            THEN CAST(("LabTestResult9_ValueAsNumber") AS DECIMAL(5,2))
            ELSE NULL
        	END AS ValueAsNumber,
		'0' as Processed
FROM FLOWFILE

labels.label:
Loop 3 for clinical data:
* Clinical data tabular inputs are mapped and converted to a relational model.
* Mappings are specified during the Data Holder's analysis phase.

properties.1: Patient with lesion not being a malignant tumor
